title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 23.256 - Information to be reported by agencies to joint committee on legislative research, when
text:
23.256.  Information to be reported by agencies to joint committee on legislative research, when. — Before October thirtieth of the second calendar year prior to the year in which a state program subject to sections 23.250 to 23.298 is scheduled to sunset, the agency shall report to the committee:
  (1)  Information regarding the application to the program of the criteria in section 23.268; and
  (2)  Any other information that the agency considers appropriate or that is requested by the committee.
(L. 2003 S.B. 299 & 40)
